title: Loneliness As Sanctuary
definition: Using solitude as a means to cultivate deeper self-awareness and compassion, even in the midst of social interactions.

difficulty_levels.beginner: Finding peace and understanding by spending time alone amidst others, like meditating in a bustling garden.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: A form of intentional solitude that allows one to observe the world from a detached perspective while still being present within it.
difficulty_levels.expert: An unconventional approach to solitude that embraces loneliness as a means to develop greater self-awareness, compassion, and understanding of others.

extra_fields.insight: The idea that solitude can serve as a sanctuary for personal growth and connection to others, even in busy or social settings.
